title: Ankit Kumar: StellarVaultt Green Belt Build
paragraphs: Ankit Kumar (@UnrealAnkit) is a Noida-based full-stack builder and CSE'28 student who is shipping in public with clear consistency. In the Stellar Journey to Mastery track, his standout project is StellarVaultt, shared publicly as a Green Belt submission and deployed at stellarvaultt.vercel.app.

StellarVaultt is a reward distribution dApp on Stellar with two contracts: reward-token (SRT) and reward-vault. Users connect wallets (Freighter/Albedo/xBull), submit a claim transaction, and receive a one-time token reward when claim conditions pass.

Core project details include: inter-contract call from vault::claim() to token::transfer_from(), has_claimed guard to prevent double claims, campaign active/inactive control, reward amount management, claim history tracking, and emitted claim events.

The full-stack implementation uses Soroban Rust contracts with a Next.js 14 + TypeScript frontend. The UI includes wallet connect, transaction lifecycle states (preparing/pending/success/failed), token balance visibility, and activity feed updates.

Engineering details visible in the repo: test coverage for contract and frontend utilities/components, CI/CD via GitHub Actions, deployment workflow to Vercel, and structured environment-based configuration for testnet contract IDs.

From a product usage perspective, the project is built for straightforward reward campaign operations: admins initialize campaign parameters, users verify eligibility by wallet connection, and claim execution is tracked through clear status states and recent activity updates on testnet.
